mechanic: mages matter but supply decides campaigns
road_level affects army speed, tax, news and reinforcement
winter_attrition should affect cavalry and supply
loyalty and legitimacy can change army ownership
debt and pay delays affect mercenary loyalty

rule: A battle is casualties, legitimacy, morale, debt and memory.

rule: Campaigns may include one or two mages attached to headquarters, not hundreds.
Killing or capturing a mage can change a war more than destroying a small unit.

rule: Forbidden magic can trigger revolt, sanctions or pogroms.
